Notes — Commercial Position
• AFP 1 (£22,985 gross) — confirm payment received from Dandara.
• AFP 2 submitted 30 Apr: gross certified £167,134 cumulative | net £156,739.46 (Ian Barnes certified, 2.5% retention) | due 28 May 2026.
• Programme behind: Kerbs (0%), Tarmac (0%), Type 1 subbase (0%), Terram (0%) not started in any zone. Zone 1 had planned completion 15 Apr — still no kerbs or tarmac.
• 7 time extension variations (A–G) already raised — weeks of additional prelims being claimed. Start date under dispute.
• Materials on Site £47,815 (manhole rings, covers, pipe) — on site, not yet installed, included in AFP2.
• Services (0%) and Street Lighting (0%) not yet started — will fall into AFP 3/4.
• QS to update BoQ/cashflow once programme zones revised to new layout.
• Contract sum discrepancy: Signed contract £450,000 vs BoQ total £450,142.39 — £142 gap. Reconcile at final account.
• Main contractor’s discount: BoQ includes -£10,800.75 Dandara discount “to be omitted at FA” — track and exclude from final settlement.
• Defects period: 12 months from PC (agreed 29 Jun 2026). Estimated defects end: 29 Jun 2027. Final retention release (~£1,960) due at defects end.
